parameters: \solDidn't Baron Smirnoff say not to waste his time? Scram!
\solAre those... the endorsements he was looking for?
\solVery well then. You may enter the garrison, but let me be clear:
you are NOT authorized to pass into Telluria Field.
\solYou heard Baron Smirnoff... don't come here wasting
his time if you haven't done what he's asked!
to come through here... get outta' my face.
\p4Now just wait a minute! You can't
\solI can talk to you however I'd like. Especially when
the king himself ordered us to have this place on
lockdown. Unless someone important said you can
come through, no one gets past this garrison!
\p2We got through the southern garrison without anyone
so much as batting an eye at us... what's the
\solIt's the border between the Blazing Sands and Telluria Field,
with Telluria Castle just a bit to the west. You don't think
there'd be a lot of criminal activity coming through here?
\p3I get that... but we aren't criminals. In fact, we're
an adventuring party fighting for the good of all
Tellurians. We recently liberated Adon from
\solLook, that's nice and all, but unless you're some sort
of nobility, you're not getting through here. And you
four certainly carry yourselves like commoners...
\solIf any of you were knights, or knew one personally,
you could get through here. And becoming a knight is
hard these days... the only person I know who can
bestow the rank of knight is the local baron.
\-Soldiers! What seems to be the problem?
\solBaron! It's nothing, really... I was just letting
these folk know they can't get through here!
\-So you're doing your job! Yes, he's right... none
of you have permission to cross this garrison!
\p2Well, how can we change that, Baron, uh...
\smirnoffSmirnoff... Baron Smirnoff! And what, you're asking
if you can get my permission to get through here?
Never in a million years! I just met you!
\p3What if... we're not looking for your permission?
But we still seek something from you.
\p3You're a baron... that means you can make someone a Tellurian
knight. And then we'd be able to cross through here, right?
\smirnoffHah! You're a bunch of clowns! Stop wasting my time!
\smirnoffNot in the eyes of the kingdom! Although...
I've noticed your presence in particular
since I got here. You have the spirit
\smirnoffOkay... you four are ridiculous, but I'll humor you,
with a task you will never be able to accomplish...
If you can appease the leaders of all
3 cities in Southern Telluria and gain
\smirnoff...then I will make you an honorary Tellurian knight!
\smirnoffNow get out of my way... and don't come here wasting
my time unless you've actually done what I've asked!
\solYou're on his bad side. Baron Smirnoff is a master of the elements.
He will find a way to challenge you in battle, and I can assure you
that will be the last time you ever raise your sword to fight.
\p3Well... let's just worry about these endorsements, shall we?
\solWe're up here with crossbows. If anyone tries
to break into the garrison, we'll stop 'em!
\solWhat are you doing up here? We need to keep
the roof clear for us crossbowmen!
\solI need someone to take over my shift...
my legs are killing me... why can't
we install chairs up here... leaning
on this wall is chafing me...
\solI'm on the job... please let me focus.
\solBe careful in Telluria Field... you'd think Telluria Castle
being nearby would make the region safer, but all the activity
seems to have the opposite effect.
\solThe monsters are pretty strong going on ahead.
\knightThis border is extremely dangerous. I'm worried
for the safety of Southern Telluria...
